subcodes.first_line: O thou who strivest in service to the Cause of God! That which flowed from the pen of sincerity was noted and understood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ساعی در خدمت امرالله آنچه از قلم خلوص تحریر یافت منظور گردید و مفهوم شد
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @exhortations and counsels, @firmness in the Covenant, @business; financial; property matters
